title: IntakeNormalizedPayload
description: Canonical lab request produced by the ETL worker from an intake.raw message. Consumed by the Scribe/Provisioning workers.

extras.description: Fields that go into the labs.extras JSONB column. Includes virt_size, is_extension, ai_*, gpu_required, statement_of_work, deployment_option, application_type, extension_* and any unknown sheet columns.

is_standard_config.description: True if all is_standard_criteria fields have standard values and the description contains no complexity keywords. Determines whether the Provisioning worker auto-provisions or queues for manual review.

DbColumns.title: DbColumns
DbColumns.description: Fields mapped directly to columns in the labs table. All required fields are guaranteed present after ETL transformation.

cluster_id.description: ETL-generated UUID for the cluster resource.

generated_name.description: Short, DNS-safe lab identifier (e.g. 'opl-a7f3b2'). Used as the unique key in the labs table.

cluster_name.description: DNS-safe name derived from company_name + project_name (e.g. 'acme-fsi-demo').

cloud_provider.description: Cloud provider for the lab cluster. Currently always 'aws'.

state.description: Initial state set by ETL. Always 'Pending' on intake.normalized.

primary_first.description: Primary contact first name (split from primary_contact_name).

primary_last.description: Primary contact last name (split from primary_contact_name).

project_name.description: Project identifier used in cluster_name derivation.

notes.description: Requestor notes (from the note sheet field).

end_date.description: Computed end date derived from start_date + lease_time. ISO 8601 or empty string if unparseable.

lease_time.description: Original lease string from the sheet (e.g. '3 weeks (15 working days)').

region.description: Region/timezone from the sheet's timezone field.

partner.description: Whether this is a partner lab. Defaults to false.

always_on.description: Whether the lab should remain active outside business hours. Defaults to false.

hold.description: Whether provisioning should be held pending manual review. Defaults to false.

request_id.description: Original form_response_id passed through for traceability.
